untranslatable_reason: Signal relies on intraday time-of-day pattern (1:00 PM - 4:00 PM) and historical mean reversion based on bar close comparisons across morning vs afternoon periods. The allowed indicators do not include time-of-day filtering or historical bar comparison operators. The core logic requires comparing the mean of afternoon bars against the mean of morning bars within a rolling window, which cannot be expressed with the provided indicator set (no bar_time, no historical mean comparisons, no conditional aggregation operators).
translation_notes: The signal is fundamentally about intraday timing and comparative performance between time buckets rather than technical indicator levels. A proper translation would require: (1) time-of-day gating functionality, (2) ability to compare current bar against historical mean of bars in specific time windows, or (3) a pre-computed indicator that encodes the afternoon-premium pattern. None of these capabilities exist in the allowed indicator list.
